title: Optical Absorption in HgTe and HgCdTe
preparation_summary: purified elements sealed in cleaned baked quartz; heated above calculated melting point for more than 30 h; slowly cooled; reheated above melting point in vertical Bridgman furnace
notes: The x=0 and x=0.005 positive values must not be converted to negative signed gaps; no exact room-temperature kelvin value is assigned
